description: Registry of trackable ACTIVE-STATES — on/off toggles the interactive sheet renders for the PLAYER. Feats reference these by id (e.g. condition: "state:rage"). Distinct from conditions.json (status effects, mostly inflicted on targets / GM-side) and from build selections (daily_mode_choice / choice). Grows as professions are added.

states.name: Hidden
states.note: Player stealth state. Feats key off it (Agent Undercut, Lethal Precision, Nobody is Home, Blade in the Night).

states.name: Obscured
states.note: Partial-concealment state; referenced alongside Hidden by many Agent feats.

states.name: Primal Form
states.note: Shapechange state; cannot Cast a Spell while active. Stat block swap is future/summon-system work.

states.name: Arbiter Aura(s)
states.note: Multiple may be active at once (Aura of Resolve, Aura of Creed). Tracks defense/stat modifiers granted to allies; attack/damage parts are description.

not_in_registry: Enemy-applied states (Hexed, Cursed, Marked-on-target) and all conditions.json statuses are NOT player active-states — they are description / GM-side. Build selections (Mantle, Field Kit module, Spell Shapes) are tracked via choice/daily_mode_choice, not here.
